query:
INSERT INTO user_decrypt_share (
                    gw_reference_id,
                    tx_hash,
                    share_index,
                    share,
                    kms_signature,
                    extra_data
                )
                VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
                ON CONFLICT (gw_reference_id, share_index) DO NOTHING
